SEARCH

Class MovieDatabase

java.lang.Object
MovieDatabase
public class MovieDatabase extends Object
Manages the SQLite database backend for Phase 4 of the Movie Tracker DMS. This class connects to a user-supplied database file and performs database CRUD operations, validation, display formatting, and average rating/runtime calculations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MovieDatabase()
    Creates a database manager with no active database connection.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addMovie(Movie movie)
    Inserts a valid movie record into the database when the movie ID is unused.

    Calculates the average rating of all database movie records.

    Calculates the total runtime of all database movie records.

    Closes the database connection or fallback storage mode when the program exits.

    Connects to the SQLite database file selected by the user.

    Builds the custom calculation summary for the GUI output area.

    Returns the database path currently assigned to this database manager.

  • Constructor Details

    • MovieDatabase

      public MovieDatabase()
      Creates a database manager with no active database connection.

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public boolean connect(String databasePath)
      Connects to the SQLite database file selected by the user.
      Parameters:
      databasePath - the file path of the SQLite database
      Returns:
      true if the database is connected or local fallback storage is available, false otherwise

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Reports whether the database layer is ready for use.
      Returns:
      true if a SQLite connection or fallback storage is active, false otherwise

    • getDatabasePath

      public String getDatabasePath()
      Returns the database path currently assigned to this database manager.
      Returns:
      the current database file path

    • createTable

      public boolean createTable()
      Creates the movies table in the connected database when it does not already exist.
      Returns:
      true if the table exists or was created successfully, false otherwise

    • addMovie

      public boolean addMovie(Movie movie)
      Inserts a valid movie record into the database when the movie ID is unused.
      Parameters:
      movie - the movie record to insert
      Returns:
      true if the movie was saved, false otherwise

    • updateMovie

      public boolean updateMovie(int movieId, Movie updatedMovie)
      Updates the editable values for an existing movie record.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie record to update
      updatedMovie - the replacement movie values
      Returns:
      true if the record was updated, false otherwise

    • deleteMovie

      public boolean deleteMovie(int movieId)
      Deletes one movie record from the database by ID.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie record to delete
      Returns:
      true if the record was deleted, false otherwise

    • findMovieById

      public Movie findMovieById(int movieId)
      Finds one movie record by ID.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the movie ID to search for
      Returns:
      the matching movie, or null if no matching record exists

    • loadMovies

      public ArrayList<Movie> loadMovies()
      Loads all movie records currently stored in the database.
      Returns:
      a list of movie records ordered by movie ID

    • formatMovieTable

      public String formatMovieTable()
      Builds a formatted display table of all movie records in the database.
      Returns:
      a formatted movie table, or a message if no records are stored

    • calculateAverageRating

      public double calculateAverageRating()
      Calculates the average rating of all database movie records.
      Returns:
      the average rating, or 0.0 when no records are available

    • calculateTotalRuntime

      public int calculateTotalRuntime()
      Calculates the total runtime of all database movie records.
      Returns:
      the total runtime in minutes

    • getCalculationSummary

      public String getCalculationSummary()
      Builds the custom calculation summary for the GUI output area.
      Returns:
      the average rating and total runtime summary, or a message if no records exist

    • getMovieCount

      public int getMovieCount()
      Counts the number of movie records stored in the database.
      Returns:
      the movie record count

    • validateMovie

      public boolean validateMovie(Movie movie)
      Validates a movie record before it is stored in the database.
      Parameters:
      movie - the movie record to validate
      Returns:
      true if the movie contains acceptable values, false otherwise

    • close

      public boolean close()
      Closes the database connection or fallback storage mode when the program exits.
      Returns:
      true if the database layer closed successfully, false otherwise
